description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2-slim-jessie Docker image with a docker:18.05-dind service aliased as docker_service_host and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. Define three stages: release-tag, check-version, and release-version. Add a release_tag job in the release-tag stage that runs the commands pip install tox and tox, and configure it to run only for Git tags. No caches, artifacts, or additional deployment targets are specified.
